questions.question: Explain Data Engineering Troubleshooting Part 1C and its primary use case in Data Engineering.
questions.answer: Data Engineering Troubleshooting Part 1C provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with Data Engineering Troubleshooting Part 1C?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the Data Engineering runtime optimize Data Engineering Troubleshooting Part 1C under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
